content: Semana 2 (W16). metrics-plan.json NO EXISTE — metrics-setup not-started por 2ª semana consecutiva. Foundation Layer 2 approved, Layer 3 pending review. ANOMALÍAS PageSpeed: (1) TBT mobile +45% WoW (81.5ms vs 54ms baseline) — spike 801ms 13-abril, still recovering, (2) LCP mobile 16s = crítico (6x objetivo Google), (3) performance mobile -7.7% WoW. SEO 92/100 excelente y estable. RECS: [HIGH] metrics-setup → P00-Metrics, [HIGH] LCP optimization investigate, [MEDIUM] TBT root cause investigate.
